typography.h1_classes: font-heading text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ tracking-tighter uppercase leading-none text-white
typography.h2_classes: font-heading text-3xl sm:text-4xl+ tracking-tight uppercase leading-tight text-white

layout.spacing_scale: Generous (p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24) to create a luxurious, uncrowded feel.
layout.border_radius: Sharp edges (rounded-none) or very subtle (rounded-sm) for a tough, serious look. No pill-shaped buttons.

header.style: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60, fixed top-0 w-full z-50 border-b border-white/5
header.links: Uppercase, tracking-widest, text-xs text-gray-300 hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-colors

hero.layout: Full viewport height (min-h-screen). Background image with heavy gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-black/90 via-black/60 to-transparent).
hero.content: Left-aligned, massive H1, sophisticated subheading. Strong CTA button.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-heading tracking-widest uppercase text-xl px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#F3E5AB] transition-colors shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] font-heading tracking-widest uppercase text-xl px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 transition-colors

cards.style: bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 p-8 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/30 transition-colors duration-300 group
cards.icon_style: text-[#D4AF37] w-10 h-10 mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300

sections.name: Header
sections.content: Logo (Text 'ESTILO EM DUAS RODAS'), Links: O Ebook, O Autor, Benefícios, Depoimentos, CTA: 'Garantir Cópia'

sections.name: Hero
sections.content: Impactful H1: 'A Essência da Irmandade em Duas Rodas'. Subheading: 'Descubra os princípios, a segurança e a verdadeira identidade dos Moto Clubes.'. CTA: 'Quero o Ebook por R$59,90'

sections.name: About Author / Book
sections.content: Split layout. Image of Cel. Wellington. Text: 'Cel. Wellington Cardoso Laureano - Veterano da Polícia Militar e fundador de Moto Clubes. Uma vida dedicada à disciplina e paixão sobre rodas.'

sections.name: Key Points (Benefits)
sections.content: Bento Grid or 3-column layout. Points: Liberdade, Irmandade, Segurança, Respeito. Use icons (lucide-react: Shield, Flame, Users, Navigation).

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.content: Fictional quotes from Moto Clube members. Dark cards with subtle gold accents.

sections.name: Final CTA (Purchase Card)
sections.content: Massive central card. Ebook mockup image. Price: R$ 59,90. Guarantee seals. Final primary button.

images.description: Cinematic bikers on highway at dusk. Use as hero background with gradient overlay.
Distinguished veteran biker. Use in the About the Author section.
Digital ebook mockup. Use in the final purchase CTA section.
Premium black leather texture. Use as subtle background in key points or testimonials section with heavy opacity (e.g., opacity-10).

icons.usage: Use icons heavily in the Key Points section. Colors must be #D4AF37 (Gold).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons should have a subtle glow effect (box-shadow) on hover. Cards should have their borders change from white/5 to gold/30 on hover.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use Framer Motion to fade up elements as they scroll into view. Stagger children in grids.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text has sufficient contrast against dark backgrounds. Use text-shadow if placed directly over images.
accessibility.testing: All buttons and links must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard JS files, do not use TSX.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Bebas Neue' for impactful titles, 'Cormorant Garamond' for elegant subtitles, and 'Outfit' for body.
Build custom HTML/Tailwind layouts for this marketing page, avoiding rigid Shadcn components unless necessary for form inputs.
Apply the luxury dark theme (bg-[#0A0A0A]) with gold (#D4AF37) accents as specified.
Ensure the hero section overlay is bg-black/60 to allow the image to breathe while keeping text readable.
The final CTA must prominently display the ebook_mockup image and a massive 'R$59,90' button.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
